channel.title: U4Claude
channel.description: Updates to U4Claude (Arcanii Mod) — Claude.ai usage menu bar app for macOS.

item.title: v1.2.0
item.description:
v1.2.0 — Auth-failure UX overhaul, multi-account ergonomics, history export

  • Auto-prompt re-login when the session expires — no more "right-click → Auth Settings" detour.
  • ⌘1–⌘9 keyboard shortcuts for switching between configured accounts.
  • Rolling usage history capture + CSV export from the diagnostics view.
  • Better Cloudflare vs. session-invalid distinction in the API layer.
  • About tab simplified, log messages normalized to English, Chrome user-agent bumped to 140.

See the full release notes for the complete changelog and internal cleanup.
